title: dicymanthes apoensis
intro: Dicymanthes apoensis, also known as the Apo daisy or Apo mountain daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Compositae. It is a perennial plant native to the Philippines, with medicinal properties attributed to its leaves and stems, which contain compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Dicymanthes apoensis include its potential to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Dicymanthes apoensis is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it may also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
